root_text.an6.35:1.3: Aniccasaññā, anicce dukkhasaññā, dukkhe anattasaññā, pahānasaññā, virāgasaññā, nirodhasaññā—
root_text.an6.35:1.4: ime kho, bhikkhave, cha dhammā vijjābhāgiyā”ti.

translation_text.an6.35:0.3: Things That Play a Part in Realization
translation_text.an6.35:1.1: “These six things play a part in realization.
translation_text.an6.35:1.3: The perception of impermanence, the perception of suffering in impermanence, the perception of not-self in suffering, the perception of giving up, the perception of fading away, and the perception of cessation.
translation_text.an6.35:1.4: These are the six things that play a part in realization.”
